allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "=== Apache estado ==="; Get-Process httpd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id | Format-Table; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "ERROR: $_" }; "---"; $env:PGPASSWORD = "admin123"; $psql = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe"; "=== Member id=1 ==="; & $psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -d iron_body -c "SELECT id, member_uuid, full_name, document_number, email, phone FROM members LIMIT 5;" 2>&1; "=== Transacción IRON-20260527-ZV0WI3-19454 ==="; & $psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -d iron_body -c "SELECT reference, status, amount, currency, customer, failure_reason FROM payment_transactions WHERE reference LIKE 'IRON-20260527%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;" 2>&1)
